Calculation.Text: /*Converts JSON text into a JSON string (usually for testing purposes) Author: Kyle Williams Date: 11/20/2019 To test JSON conversion in data viewer: JSONFormatElements ( Evaluate ( JSON.stringify ( $$JSON ) ) ) */ "\"" & Substitute( json ;[ ¶; "" ] ;[ Char(9); "" ] ;[ "\r"; ¶ ] ;[ "\t"; Char(9) ] ;[ Char(92); Char(92) & Char(92) ] ;[ Char(34); "\\\"" ] ;[ ¶; "\r" ] ;[ Char(9); "\t" ] ) & "\""
